title: POLAND enforcement action against Restaurant Partner Polska (1,393,300)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Polish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 1,393,300 on Restaurant Partner Polska. The controller of the 'Glovo' application requested that customers provide a scan or photograph of an identity document when they were suspected of fraud. The controller had no sufficient legal basis for this. Lega...
